name: Sword Masters
author: Poki
description: Sword Masters is an online adventure game that thrusts you into a quest to become the strongest sword master! Starting with nothing but your bare hand, you're tasked with killing monsters to help villagers. In battle, you get to collect coins and a variety of weapons. Use your earnings to enhance your gear and hatch eggs, which may yield legendary pets! Level up your swords by going through different worlds and fighting with different enemies. Are you prepared to become the greatest warrior ever? How to play Sword Masters? Move: WASD or arrow keys Camera: mouse Who created Sword Masters? Sword Masters is created by emolingo games. Play their other games on Poki: Rainbow Obby ! How can I play Sword Masters for free? You can play Sword Masters for free on Poki. Can I play Sword Masters on mobile devices and desktop? Sword Masters can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Sword Masters with my friend? Yes! Sword Masters is a multiplayer game so you can play with your friends!
